title: — Synopsis
text:
Install required addons for passing conformance tests
kubeadm init phase addon [flags]

-h, --help
help for addon
help for addon

--rootfs string
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
